# <bookmarklet-name>

## Purpose

One or two sentences describing what this bookmarklet does.

## Trigger

Describe one-shot/toggle/interactive behavior.

## Target Context

State whether this is generic or site-specific.

## Assumptions

List key assumptions (DOM shape, selection, login state, browser capability).

## Known Limitations

List practical limitations.

## Maintenance Notes

Capture local details that should remain local unless reuse is proven.
